2604.07900.title: AnomalyAgent: Agentic Industrial Anomaly Synthesis via Tool-Augmented Reinforcement Learning
2604.07900.paper_summary: Industrial anomaly generation is a crucial method for alleviating the data scarcity problem in anomaly detection tasks. Most existing anomaly synthesis methods rely on single-step generation mechanisms, lacking complex reasoning and iterative optimization capabilities, making it difficult to generate anomaly samples with high semantic realism. We propose AnomalyAgent, an anomaly synthesis agent with self-reflection, knowledge retrieval, and iterative refinement capabilities, aiming to generate realistic and diverse anomalies. Specifically, AnomalyAgent is equipped with five tools: Prompt Generation (PG), Image Generation (IG), Quality Evaluation (QE), Knowledge Retrieval (KR), and Mask Generation (MG), enabling closed-loop optimization. To improve decision-making and self-reflection, we construct structured trajectories from real anomaly images and design a two-stage training framework: supervised fine-tuning followed by reinforcement learning. This process is driven by a three-part reward mechanism: (1) task rewards to supervise the quality and location rationality of generated anomalies; (2) reflection rewards to train the model's ability to improve anomaly synthesis prompt; (3) behavioral rewards to ensure adherence to the trajectory. On the MVTec-AD dataset, AnomalyAgent achieves IS/IC-L of 2.10/0.33 for anomaly generation, 57.0% classification accuracy using ResNet34, and 99.3%/74.2% AP at the image/pixel level using a simple UNet, surpassing all zero-shot SOTA methods. The code and data will be made publicly available.
2604.07900.paper_summary_zh: 工業異常生成是一種緩解異常檢測任務中數據稀缺問題的關鍵方法。大多數現有的異常合成方法依賴於單步生成機制，缺乏複雜的推理和迭代優化能力，使得生成具有高語義真實性的異常樣本變得困難。我們提出了AnomalyAgent，一個具備自我反思、知識檢索和迭代精煉能力的異常合成代理，旨在生成真實且多樣的異常。具體而言，AnomalyAgent配備了五個工具：提示生成（PG）、圖像生成（IG）、質量評估（QE）、知識檢索（KR）和掩碼生成（MG），實現閉環優化。為了改善決策和自我反思，我們從真實異常圖像構建結構化軌跡，並設計了一個兩階段的訓練框架：先進行監督微調，然後進行強化學習。這一過程由三部分獎勵機制驅動：（1）任務獎勵以監督生成異常的質量和位置合理性；（2）反思獎勵以訓練模型改進異常合成提示的能力；（3）行為獎勵以確保遵循軌跡。在MVTec-AD數據集上，AnomalyAgent在異常生成上達到2.10/0.33的IS/IC-L，使用ResNet34達到57.0%的分類準確率，並使用簡單的UNet在圖像/像素層面達到99.3%/74.2%的AP，超越所有零樣本SOTA方法。代碼和數據將公開提供。
2604.07900.author: Jiaming Su et.al.
2604.07900.authors: Jiaming Su, Tengchao Yang, Ruikang Zhang, Zhengan Yan, Haoyu Sun, Linfeng Zhang
